---
name: New question suggestion
about: Suggest a new interview question (and ideally an answer) to add
title: "[New Question] "
labels: new-question
---

**Category**
Which existing category does this belong in? (e.g., "3. Variant Interpretation & Clinical Genomics"). If you think it needs a new category, say so.

**Suggested difficulty**
🟢 Foundational / 🟡 Intermediate / 🔴 Advanced

**Question**
The question text.

**Suggested answer (optional but appreciated)**
Your draft answer. If it references a specific guideline, framework, or piece of evidence, please include a source or note if you're uncertain it reflects current guidance — this field changes quickly and we want to keep this repo held to a high bar of accuracy.

**Why this question is worth including**
Briefly, why this is a good/representative question for this role.
